zh.Swinnerton, Stafford, England: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯恩頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Stephen Swynnerton於大約1230年出生時，他的父親John Swynnerton24歲，母親Eleanor de Peshale18歲。他和Joan Ware至少有7個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1284年之前。

zh-hans.Swinnerton, Stafford, England: 英国英格兰斯塔福爾斯恩頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Stephen Swynnerton于大约1230年出生时，他的父亲John Swynnerton24岁，母亲Eleanor de Peshale18岁。他和Joan Ware至少有7个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1284年之前。

nameMeanings.name: Swynnerton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Swinnerton
meanings: English: habitational name from Swynnerton in Staffordshire. The etymology of the placename is uncertain. It may derive from Old English swille ‘sloppy mess, swill’ + ford ‘ford’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Alternatively, the first element may be swīn ‘swine, hog’, swān ‘herdsman, peasant’, swan ‘swan’, or sumor ‘summer’.

nameMeanings.name: Stephen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English spelling of the name of the first Christian martyr (Acts 6–7), whose feast is accordingly celebrated next after Christ's own ( 26 December ). His name is derived from the Greek word stephanos ‘garland, crown’.

variants.name: Stephan
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , preserving the vowels of the Greek name.

variants.name: Steven
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , reflecting the normal pronunciation of the name in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Stephen Swynnerton was born about 1230, his father, John Swynnerton, was 24 and his mother, Eleanor de Peshale, was 18. He had at least 7 sons and 1 daughter with Joan Ware. He died before 1284.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Stephen Swynnerton est né environ 1230, son père, John Swynnerton, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Eleanor de Peshale, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille avec Joan Ware. Il est décédé avant 1284.

de.lifeSummary: Als Stephen Swynnerton um 1230 geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Swynnerton 24 und seine Mutter Eleanor de Peshale 18. Er hatte mit Joan Ware mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 1284.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Stephen Swynnerton è nato il circa 1230, il suo padre, John Swynnerton, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor de Peshale, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia con Joan Ware. Morì prima del 1284.

ja.Swinnerton, Stafford, England: イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアスウイネルトン
ja.Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England: イギリススタフォードシュアイアスウイネルトン
ja.lifeSummary: Stephen Swynnertonが約1230年に生まれた時，父John Swynnertonは24歳，母Eleanor de Peshaleは18歳であった。彼はJoan Wareとの間に少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1284年以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Stephen Swynnerton(이)가 대략 1230년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Swynnerton(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor de Peshale(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Joan Ware(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1284년 이전 사망했다.

mn.Swinnerton, Stafford, England: Swynnerton, Stæffordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Stephen Swynnerton nasceu aproximadamente 1230, seu pai, John Swynnerton, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor de Peshale, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha com Joan Ware. Ele faleceu antes 1284.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Stephen Swynnerton родился около 1230 г., его отцу по имени John Swynnerton было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor de Peshale, 18. У него было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь от Joan Ware. Он умер перед 1284 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Stephen Swynnerton nació aproximadamente 1230, su papá, John Swynnerton, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Eleanor de Peshale, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija con Joan Ware. Murió antes de 1284.
